Williamson (brother of Tom) in 1925. In 1926, Emory J. Haverstock bought the hotel and added dormer windows on the top floor, using lumber salvaged from the fire-ravaged Dugan Hotel (also in Washington). Haverstock sold it to Clark and Edna Waite for $10 in 1939. In 1955, the hotel was sold for $10 to Harold Moneyhun, former owner of the Holbrooke Hotel in Grass Valley, and Edwin Furano of Nevada City. In 1968, Thomas E. Walsh used siding salvaged from the National Hotel Annex in Nevada City to enclose the side porch on the upriver side of the hotel.

name: Washoe Tribe Grinding Stone-Lam
description: Plaque placed 2017: Washoe Tribe Grinding Stone-Lam. The Washoe Tribe are the original inhabitants of the Truckee-Tahoe region. The Washoe people utilized bed rock mortar for food processing, they call it a Lam. Much of the Washoe heritage resources have been lost due to development. This Lam is a casualty of development, displaced from its original location and is an example of past practices. Working together, the Town of Truckee, Mountain Area Preservation and the Washoe Tribe agreed to place the Lam at the Trout Creek Pocket Park in order to keep it close to its original location and as a reminder of the original people who lived in the region.

name: Weiss-Hieronimus Brewery Cellar
description: The Weiss-Hieronimus Brewery Cellar. Beginning in the early 1860s and continuing until Prohibition, the lower portion of this building was the storeroom for keg beer produced first by Emille (sic) Weiss for the Weiss Brewery then by Simon Hieronimus for the Hieronimus Brewery_later known as the Nevada Brewery. As the brewery business grew, Mr. Hieronimus established a bottling plant and stable on property across the street from this building. But keg beer continued to be stored here. A fire in the summer of 1896 destroyed the original house and severely damaged the cellar. But the Nevada Brewery emerged bigger and better than ever. It was at that time that the cellar was enlarged to its present size, a ventilation system installed and refrigeration added. In 2004 the property was acquired by Jesse and Kay Connor, who carefully restored the old brewery cellar and home. This plaque has been placed to honor the legacy of both the Weiss and Hieronimus families and to remind people that the best lager beer in Nevada County was once produced here. Note: Messrs Weiss and Hieronimus were each born in France. Weiss arrived in Nevada City in 1850 and immediately opened a brewery. Hieronimus arrived in Nevada City in 1876, then operated a brewery in North Bloomfield before taking over this brewery.

name: Wells Fargo Building Site Nevada City
description: Site of Old Wells Fargo Building 1853. Dedicated to the Pioneers of California by Hydraulic Parlor No. 56 N.S.G.W. July 5, 1926. Plaque erected by Wells Fargo Bank and Union Trust Co. S.F. Calif.

name: Wells Fargo Building, North San Juan
description: Wells Fargo & Company 1854. Office and holding center for gold and currency, 1854-60. Block & Furth Co. Clothing Store, 1861-69. Chinese Laundry and store operated by Happy Go Lucky, 1890-1920. Bar and liquor store since 1934. First saloon owner, â€˜Ma' Cunningham, 1934.

name: Western America Skisport Museum
description: A monument and statue was placed by Snowshoe Thompson Lodge No. 78, Sons of Norway, Yuba City: Snowshoe Thompson. A hero of the Sierra Nevada mountains! Probably the first skier of the West. This Viking Son of Norway exemplified the spirit of a true pioneer: Strong, daring, faithful and courageous. He was the answer to CaliforniaÃ

name: William Morris Stewart House
description: William Morris Stewart Mansion Built 1855-56. Exact replica of wifeÃ

name: Wolf Post Office
description: The Nevada County Historical Landmarks Commission is pleased to announce the installation and dedication of a plaque honoring the Wolf Post Office on Sunday, October 6, 2019. Ranchers and farmers began to settle the historic agricultural community of Wolf in the 1860s. William Sweet arrived in Wolf in 1869, immigrating from Cornwall, and purchased 200 acres before his wife and children joined him in 1871. On August 24, 1888, a post office was established for the growing population of Wolf. John Sweet, one of Williamâ€™s sons, ran the post office from the living room of his ranch house and it soon became a community center and gathering place for approximately 75 residents of Wolf. It is believed that John Sweet was the longest serving U.S. Postmaster, continually running the Wolf Post Office for 52 years until his nephew W. B. Sweet took over on February 19, 1940. W. B. moved the Post Office from his uncleâ€™s home to a small building close by and served the Wolf community until 1956 when the post office was decommissioned with only 2 residents utilizing the service.

name: Woman's Christian Temperance Union
description: The first Woman's Christian Temperance Union in California organized in Grass Valley March 25, 1874. Rededicated and second plaque placed 2014: Originally placed near the corner of Neal and South Church Streets near the site of the old Congregational Church and the Women's Improvement Club building. Note: In 1972, the Congregational Church building was demolished to make way for a bank building. The first plaque was removed and stored in the nearby Methodist Church. In 2014, it was rededicated by the Manzanita Parlor of the Native Daughters at its present location on a monument constructed from petrified wood.

name: Woolman School
description: Woolman School was the first Quaker boarding school in the western United States. The school was named for John Woolman, a prominent 18th century Quaker known for, among other things, his opposition to slavery, and his efforts to promote peace among settlers and indigenous tribes. Though no longer a boarding school, the campus still provides educational programs.

name: World War I Memorial, Grass Valley
description: Plaque dedicated 1921: Honor Roll. Heroes from the Grass Valley District who gave their lives for their country 1917-1918: Anthony J. Bevilacqua, Robert H. Beyer, Lawrence A. Brasher, Melvyn Frandy, Isaac Leslie Fleming, Hedley Hill, Lenville Dooley Jatunn, William Hague, William A. Kneebone, Albert Pinkham, William Hawley Moran, James Rodgers, Clarence Crase Thomas, J. M. Spencer, Elton Thomas Whiting, John Edward White. Recently, a small plaque at the base of the main plaque added U.S. Army Nurse Elina W. Hill to the Honor Roll. Note: The above inscription is on a very large monument. Surrounding it is a grove of 16 trees, each with a marker in front inscribed with the name of one of these men and the American Legion logotype.

name: World War II & Korean War Memorial
description: Plaque dedicated by Grass Valley Elks No. 538 and Frank Gallino Post No. 130 American Legion: World War II 1941-1946 Korean 1950-1955. To the men and women who made the supreme sacrifice for our country and her noble purpose, in memory of those who died that liberty might live. Note: Plaque is on a concrete monument that includes a flagpole and benches.

name: You Bet Town Site
description: This mining camp, established between 1858-1860, consisted of 40 or 50 buildings by 1864. A school house was built midway between You Bet and Red Dog. The town was destroyed by fire in April 1869, partially rebuilt, and burned again in September 1873 and August 1915. The courts halted most hydraulic mining in 1884, but gold mining continued until the 1940s. The You Bet Post Office was closed in 1903.

name: CA Historical Marker- Floriston (Bronco)
description: Established in 1872 as Bronco, this railroad wood stop became a noted ice and lumber center and was renamed in 1891. The Floriston Pulp and Paper Company built the present town after 1899 and operated one of the world's largest pulp mill through 1930. It paper products and ice helped California's agricultural industry feed the hungry of the world.

name: Uncle Joe's Cabin
description: Joseph Gray believed that this area would be a good place for a tavern and way station for weary travelers. It was near this spot that transportation routes converged—the Henness Pass route from the upper North Fork of the Yuba, and the Dutch Flat-Donner Lake turnpike. Five years hence the Central Pacific would choose the same area as the focal point for its mountain operations. Constructed of native tamarack and lodgepole pine in about 1858, Gray’s cabin was located at today’s southwest corner of Jibboom and Bridge Streets. Experts have examined the 24’x20’ building and noticed no evidence of any kind of saw used to build the structure. The timbers had all been hewn with axes into the shape of a house.

name: The Truckee Hotel
description:
Established in 1873, the Truckee Hotel is a staple in tales of Truckee's past. First built as the American House, later known as the Whitney House, the structure stands tall on the historical registry. Touched by many as a stagecoach stop on the Dutch Flat Wagon Road, the Truckee Hotel remains a drop-in for Sierra visitors, historians, adventure seekers, foodies, actors, and musicians.

In 1976 the hotel was renamed The Truckee Hotel, and in 1992, extensive exterior renovations restored the building to its present day appearance. The recent interior remodel with warm earth tone color carpeting, linens, finishings, amenities and rich wood complements the fresh mountain air as you ease into your stay with us.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: 1849 Brewing Company
description: 1849 Brewing Co. is Grass Valley's beer lover's microbrewery with full bar & kitchen menu, wood fired pizza oven, pool table, and juke box. Open nightly.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: A Victorian Rose
description: A Victorian Rose, DOWNTOWN, hot tub, man cave,couples, families & groups welcome

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Alta Sierra Village Inn
description: Next to a golf course Located in Grass Valley, Alta Sierra Village Inn is in the mountains, within a 15-minute drive of Northstar Mine Powerhouse & Pelton Wheel Museum and Lucchesi Vineyards and Winery. This golf motel is 5.9 mi (9.4 km) from Montoliva Vineyard & Winery and 7.2 mi (11.6 km) from Empire Mine State Historic Park. Make yourself at home in one of the 15 individually decorated guestrooms, featuring refrigerators and microwaves. Flat-screen televisions are provided for your entertainment. Bathrooms have bathtubs or showers and complimentary toiletries. Conveniences include coffee/tea makers, and housekeeping is provided on request.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Avanguardia Wines Tasting Room
description: A small (actually ultra-boutique) winery, we are the home of non-traditional blended wines, with the majority of our wines being proprietary blends crafted from 2-6 different grape varieties, many of which are Italian, and all of which are pretty much out of the mainstream.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Cirino’s at Main Street
description:
Our story began in 1983 when Jerry Cirino first opened the doors to Cirino’s Bar & Grill, an Italian Restaurant in Nevada City, Ca offering “time honored” Italian recipes from the Cirino family kitchen.
This old-world tradition of using only the freshest seasonal ingredients, along with the Cirino standard of quality and flavor, left our friends and guests wanting more.

Cirino’s at Main Street boasts a menu of 70 items as well as an offering of daily specials. On any given day you can enjoy foods from neighboring Mediterranean countries or experience our signature Italian dishes while celebrating what life is truly all about… sharing the table with family, friends, delicious food and drink.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Cork 49
description: Located in beautiful downtown Grass Valley, CA we are pleased to offer a wide variety of wine

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Courtyard Inn & Suites
description: Welcome to Grass Valley Courtyard Suites, a luxury boutique hotel located near the Empire Mine State Park, and within walking distance to Downtown Grass Valley.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Dew Drop Inn
description: Local roadhouse with that nostalgic feel over 80 years in business! Karaoke on Friday night @ 8pm Huge lawn and outdoor stage, horseshoe pits & disc golf baskets. Open pool table, Cheers vibe! Open Tues-Sun 1pm-closingHappy hour 3pm-7pm mon-fri

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Diego’s Restaurant
description: Diego's celebrates hand-prepared latin inspired recipes from Chile up to California for over two decades. By operating with a culture of love, gratitude and a professional personal touch, we enjoy providing a colorful, eclectic and comfortable atmosphere where our guests are able to create and share memorable experiences together. Diego's welcomes you to come unwind and savor a warm, relaxing escape.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Elam Biggs Bed & Breakfast
description: Elam Biggs Bed & Breakfast is a historic Queen Anne Victorian home built in 1892, located at 220 Colfax Ave, Grass Valley, CA 95945.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Golden Gate Saloon
description: Before there was a hotel, there was a bar. In 1852, thousands of thirsty prospectors filled their glasses at the original Golden Gate Saloon. Our favorite watering hole has always been tenacious and inventive: after Grass Valley was destroyed by a fire in 1855, the original owners quickly adapted and sold whiskey and beer to loyal customers from a tent among the rubble the next day.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Grass Valley Brewing Company
description:
Located in the heart of historic downtown Grass Valley, we are a 15 barrel brewery that produces a variety of easy drinking, classic and innovative beers as well as sours and seltzers.
We carry a full selection of wine and hard cider and hard kombucha to make sure there’s something for everyone. We also have a full service kitchen ready to serve you up some delicious bites!

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Lamb’s Victorian Inn
description: Located on a leafy green corner lot on Church Street, Lamb’s Victorian Inn is only a short distance to Empire Mine State Historic Park, the Yuba River, vineyards, wineries, golf courses, the County Fairgrounds and other attractions.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Lucchesi Vineyards Tasting Room
description: We specialize in traditionally crafted wines produced in small lots to capture their varietal character and regional qualities. We are currently growing 16 different varietals at our winery in Grass Valley including Zinfandel, Merlot, Chardonnay, Sauvignon Blanc Muscat, Sauvignon Blanc, Pinot Grigio, Syrah, Cabernet Franc, Viognier, Cabernet Sauvignon, Tempranillo, Petite Sirah, and Petit Verdot, and three Portuguese Port Varietals: Tinto Cão, Tinta Negra Molé, and Touriga Nacional. We hope you come out for wine tasting at the Vineyard.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Lucchesi Vineyards Winery
description: Our founders, Mario and Linda Clough, were enjoying a glass of wine on the hilltop of their beautiful property, when Mario shared his dream of owning a vineyard and winery. This dream became their shared passion, and Lucchesi Vineyards and Winery was founded. With the help of friends, family, and their five children, the vines were planted in 2000. Our beautiful, view forever vineyard in Grass Valley has been family owned and operated ever since.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: MeZé Eatery
description: Mezé, a Middle Eastern Eatery offering conscious, healthy, organic and simple food, a casual and warm atmosphere, ordering convenience, excellent customer service and attention to detail

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Naggiar Vineyards
description: We offer traditional Rhone, Bordeaux, and Italian wines whose quality comes from selecting varietals that flourish in our particular location. From planting to uncorking, we support the winemaking process with meticulous attention to detail at every level.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Sergio’s Caffe
description: Sergio's Caffé opened in November 2002 in the cozy Mill Street space in Grass Valley. After a rocky start, which included having to sell their car to meet expenses, Sergio and Lena decided to expand their business when Karma Coffee closed it’s doors down the street. The new 1,700-square-foot space have outdoor seating with heaters and 45 seats indoors. The new Caffé have also an open kitchen, wine bar and enough room for live music.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Sierra Mountain Inn
description:
A charming boutique Inn with uniquely appointed rooms, suites and stand-alone cozy cottage.

Conveniently located just blocks from theatres, restaurants and shops in Historic Downtown Grass Valley. It’s a short drive to exploring the beautiful Gold Country or visiting family and friends,

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Sierra Starr Vineyard & Winery (Store)
description: The Starr family has been producing award winning wines in the Sierra Foothills since 1996. We take pride in crafting small lot wines from our estate vineyards, specializing in Zinfandel, Sauvignon Blanc and Cabernet Franc (along with many others). We strive for our wines to express our unique terroir and showcase varietal character at its finest. Utilizing our under ground-gravity flow winery, solar power and dry farming, we sustainably craft our wines with passion. We welcome you to taste these wines and experience all that downtown Grass Valley, the heart of the gold country, has to offer.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Sierra Starr Vineyard & Winery (Winery)
description: The Starr family has been producing award winning wines in the Sierra Foothills since 1996. We take pride in crafting small lot wines from our estate vineyards, specializing in Zinfandel, Sauvignon Blanc and Cabernet Franc (along with many others). We strive for our wines to express our unique terroir and showcase varietal character at its finest. Utilizing our under ground-gravity flow winery, solar power and dry farming, we sustainably craft our wines with passion. We welcome you to taste these wines and experience all that downtown Grass Valley, the heart of the gold country, has to offer.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: South Pine Cafe
description:
Breakfast. Lunch. Beer.
✨Feel the joy✨

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: The Holbrooke Hotel
description:
Celebrating Grass Valley at its most authentic…unearthed, restored and brought forward into today. Welcome to the Holbrooke Hotel: where modern luxuries blend seamlessly with a historically unique, rustic-yet-refined, one-of-a-kind property. Set in the heart of our bustling town with easy access to restaurants, tasting rooms, shops and historical sights, our meticulously renovated California Historical Landmark offers a true break from the ordinary and an unforgettable stay.

So dust off your boots and sit a spell! After serving the community for over 150 years, the Holbrooke Hotel is ready to spend some time with you.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: The Thirsty Barrel Taphouse
description: Thirsty Barrel opened it’s doors officially in Dec. 1, 2017. After months of searching for a great place to open a business and a great place to live, it became clear that the Grass Valley and Nevada County area is the right choice. We look forward to providing you the best service and the greatest possible products we can. We offer 30 taps of constantly rotating craft beers, great local wines, and great food to compliment both. Plus we love dogs, bring your furry friend along to our dog freindly patio. As we grow, it is our hopes that we become embedded as a staple in Grass Valley and Nevada County because we love our community.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Tofanelli’s Gold Country Bistro
description: Tofanelli's Gold Country Bistro is renowned for many things: Award-winning patio dining, amazing breakfasts, 101 omelet menu, an incredible burger menu, a relaxing atmosphere, location (right in Downtown Historic Grass Valley next door to the Center For The Arts), great dinner selections (pasta, salads, steaks, seafood, chicken) and our daily specials. Come in soon to try us out and make sure you visit our website for more information, directions, and menu items.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Wild Eye Pub
description:
The original Empire House was built in 1851, before there was Grass Valley, in the historic Boston Ravine neighborhood. After 167 years of history, it became the Wild Eye Pub in 2018.

Enjoy our local & organic, scratch-made menu, regional libations, and nightly live events. Seasonally, we host creekside dining along our 100' shoreline of
free-flowing Wolf Creek.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Alloro Cucina Italiana
description: Alloro was founded on the dreams of a family that has worked in the kitchen for over 25 years. It is our goal for our customers to feel this warm and welcoming environment. From our family to yours, we welcome you.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Antonio Ayestaran Custom Catering
description: Offering delicious food, extraordinary personal service, and a genuine passion for hospitality, Antonio helps you make memories for family and friends. Several factors distinguish one catering company from others. Antonio provides a full-service catering service. His service includes the attention to detail and comprehensive pricing you will not get from other caterers. Antonio has built an exemplary reputation and relationship with dozens of venues for site-specific restrictions, amenities, and logistic issues to resolve problems you will never be aware could be of concern. Rental coordination for dinnerware and linens are all part of a package.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: BackPorch Market
description: BackPorch Market offers a wide selection of gourmet cheeses, Charcuterie, baguettes, accoutrements, desesrts and fine wines.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: BrewBilt Brewing Company
description:
BrewBilt Brewing was founded in 2021 with a deliberate focus on balanced and approachable beers made with locally sourced craft malt. This commitment to Sacramento Valley-grown barley, wheat, and oats supports local craft-minded producers like Admiral Maltings, reduces the carbon footprint of our production, and makes damn tasty beer that maintains freshness better than beer made from commodity malts.

In December 2023, we opened our taproom and restaurant BrewBilt BrewHaus in downtown Nevada City. BrewHaus shares the brewery's devotion to European craft quality and local ingredients, served up by friendly faces in a relaxed atmosphere. We also have the sunniest patio in town!

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: BriarPatch Food Co-op
description: We offer goods and groceries that are truly good! As a whole food and wholesome goods grocery store, we’re collectively owned by the folks who shop here – like YOU!

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Cake Bakery & Cafe
description: Cake Bakery creates some of the most intricate, delicious and unique pastries and desserts in Northern California.  Baked with only the finest ingredients (locally sourced when possible), we continually strive to meld classic French baking techniques with new world twists.  Cake Bakery starts its day at 4:00 a.m. baking fresh, traditional French style baguettes as well as a range of different breads based on seasonal ingredients and local favorites.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Caroline’s Coffee Roasters
description:
Our community means the world to us, and we appreciate each of you who love our coffee.  Our shop is located in historic downtown Grass Valley, in Northern California.

Since 1982 we have been here to serve you.  Whether you’re looking for fresh roasted beans or a drink to take with you, we take pride in making the best possible product.  After all, our name’s on it!

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: El Milagro Mexican Restaurant
description: At El Milagro Mexican Restaurant, we celebrate authentic Mexican cuisine in a warm and inviting atmosphere. Located in Grass Valley, CA, our story is rooted in a passion for fresh, flavorful dishes that evoke the heart of Mexico. From perfectly seasoned enchiladas to mouthwatering carne asada, each plate is crafted with care and quality ingredients. Our dedicated team ensures a friendly dining experience, whether you’re enjoying a family meal or a casual outing. With vegan options, outdoor seating, and a devotion to sustainable practices, El Milagro is a cherished haven for food lovers seeking genuine Mexican hospitality and taste.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Enrique’s Lounge
description: Handcrafted Cocktail Lounge focusing on global shareable plates and classic Entrées. We host parties, events and FUN!

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Flour Garden Bakery
description: The Flour Garden opened March 16, 1981. It was a fortuitous blend of Bill’s building skills and Susan’s culinary passion. In this, Flour Garden’s 44th year, Bill and Susan are translating their love of fine food into a community wide effort to support local organic farmers. Artisan breads and 12 varieties of bagels are baked with 100% organic flours and grains, including locally grown, organic stone-grown wheat provided by Reed Hamilton at Grass Valley Grains. Organic flours, fruits, vegetables, and other ingredients are increasingly locally-sourced as relationships with local farmers are expanded.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Gold Vibe Kombuchary
description: Brothers Patrick and Sean Millar incorporated the Kombuchary in 2018 with nothing more than a dream. Sean had been brewing kombucha for many years as a hobby and Patrick had a new found motivation with his son on the way. The Kombuchary began as NC Kombuchary bringing a unique whole food fermented soft kombucha to the local community. With the help of their sister Erin, Patricks wife Sonya, and a few early investors that believed in the vision, their first products were self distributed throughout the local community in the spring of 2019.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Golden Gate Saloon
description: A seamless flow from the bar to the dining room and outdoor patio offers our guests the perfect mix of food and drink. Enjoy a contemporary menu with the fresh flavors of California, utilizing the bounty of our local and organic farms. The Golden Gate menu is updated seasonally.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Iron Door Speakeasy
description: Reputed to have been both brothel and speakeasy in times past, The Iron Door is now reimagined with warm amber lighting, warm wood ceilings, original stone walls, plush banquettes and a beautiful custom bar—set against original metal doors that once led to a series of underground tunnels. The Iron Door boasts a collection of hand-crafted, custom-blended, creative and classic drinks—or if you’re searching for something more straightforward, our beer taps and wine list won’t disappoint.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Maria’s Mexican Restaurant
description: Family restaurant serving homecooked authentic Mexican food for over 30 years. Located in Grass Valley, CA Maria's serves authentic Mexcian food created from scratch. We also serve our famous margaritas as well as tequila.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Marshall’s Pasties
description: Marshall's Pasties serves true Cornish pasties, prepared and rolled by hand, seasoned and baked in their own kitchen.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Mountain Ranch Winery
description:
The secret that makes Mountain Ranch Winery special stems from winemaker Bob Hoffman’s passion for winemaking. Inside every bottle is a combination of science, history, geology, psychology and a little bit of magic. Although Mountain Ranch Winery was established in 2003, Bob’s interest goes back 35 years to when he realized that sharing a good bottle of wine transcends a meal, bonds a friendship, and transforms an event into a celebration. 

 At Mountain Ranch Winery, wine tasting is an experience that goes beyond the palette. At each tasting, Bob will share his vast knowledge of wines as well as interesting stories of his travels in the wine business. While wines from Mountain Ranch Winery are available in fine restaurants across the country, Bob is able to keep the prices affordable by selling directly from the winery. In 2020, Bob and his future wife Lisa were fortunate to find a beautiful 6.5-acre property in Grass Valley with a winery already on the property, and a large garage with space for a pottery studio. Lisa takes a ball of clay and transforms it into a one of a kind piece of pottery. Her functional pieces of pottery are on display and for sale at the winery. 

Comfortable. That is how we want our customers to feel while at the winery. So we set it up to feel like you are welcomed into our home. It’s a place to relax, try delicious wines, shop for pottery, play a round of Bocce Ball, and make new friends. Wine and art, laughter and fun. That is what Mountain Ranch Winery is about.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Pete’s Pizza & Tap House
description: We specialize in crafting thin-crust pizzas made fresh daily with homemade dough and our secret recipe sauce, promising an authentic flavor in every bite. Whether you’re craving pizza by the slice or a whole pie to share, our menu caters to every appetite.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay

name: Wyld Tiger Sourdough Bakery
description: Wyld Tiger Sourdough Bakery | Organic, long fermented & made with love.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Zalt & Co. BBQ
description:
Bringing BBQ, smoked meats, and full dinners straight to your table.
No work, no fuss—just damn good BBQ.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Frescas Farms & Vineyard
description:
Welcome to Frescas Farms & Vineyard. We create unforgettable experiences.

Our commitment to sustainable, regenerative and all natural farming practices illustrate our commitment to the highest standards of ethical and responsible stewardship. We invite you to join us on this incredible estate, whether you are an overnight guest or a wine grape buyer, and partake in all of the beauty that this property has to offer.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Gold Miners Inn
description:
Experience the beauty of the Sierra Foothills at our boutique hotel in Grass Valley, CA
Gold Miners Inn Grass Valley, an Ascend Collection™ Hotel, features rustic comfort in the Sierra Nevada gold country. Our stylish rooms feature art that evokes the region and comfortable beds made up with premium linens. Our one-of-a-kind hotel sits in Grass Valley, in what once was bustling chaos of mine claims, saloons, and miners camps during the 1849 California Gold Rush. From our smoke-free hotel, you’re within easy reach of the Empire Mine State Park and many other attractions.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Grass Valley RV Resort
description: Grass Valley RV Resort offers a serene getaway with 148 full hookup, paved RV sites & top-notch amenities.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Jule Vacation Rentals
description: Our mission is to redefine the vacation rental experience by delivering personalized service, maximizing property potential, and creating memorable guest experiences. We bridge the gap between comfort and style while helping property owners achieve outstanding results.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: The Pines Motel and Cottages
description: The Pines is Located 8 blocks from Historic Downtown Grass Valley California. We offer a beautiful and peaceful setting under a canopy of old growth trees surrounded by lawns and flower gardens. We’re thankful to be the best reviewed hotel in the area on several of the largest platforms. We offer very clean Studio’s and Cottages, most with kitchens and others with kitchenettes. The area and grounds are a dog’s dream and if well behaved stay for free. We are known for unmatched hospitality and a relaxed atmosphere. Book us directly by using the book now button or call us 530-273-4232. We look forward to your visit!

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Pepe's Cafe
description: Try their Jalapeño popper burger for starters! They serve breakfast and lunch.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Gold Rush Cookie Company
description:
Gold Rush Cookie Company is the collaborative vision of husband and wife team Karen and Mark Gold.

Why did we start baking? Chocolate chip cookies are Karen's favorite comfort treat. It's her go-to dessert. Fresh-baked, warm, and that homemade taste are the most satisfying aspects for her. Mark loves a variety of desserts, but, most times he enjoys the simplicity, flavor and texture of a cookie. Unlike a cake or pie, you don't have to share a cookie, it's your own personal delight.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Alta Sierra Wine Shop
description:
The Alta Sierra Wine Shop was opened in 2009 by Tina and Ray Yedding with Dave Luce as a silent partner. Dave bought the shop from them in 2011. His mission as the owner of the shop was to search out beautiful wines featuring the small, the artisanal, the producers of wine with integrity who respected their workers and the land.

Dave continued his commitment to this pursuit for the 15 years he owned and ran the wine shop. In addition to offering beautiful wines at the best price point, he created a unique space that is welcoming, friendly, safe, and fun. Many friendships have been forged not only between Dave and his customers, but between the customers themselves at the Alta Sierra Wine Shop. This, more than anything, makes the Alta Sierra Wine Shop special.

My name is Dana Price. Dave sold the shop to me July 1 of 2024. It is my utmost pleasure to be the owner of this precious shop. I will continue the legacy of offering beautiful wines at the best price, offer the community opportunities to fund raise with wine tasting events, and facilitate the unique, caring, friendly, safe, and inclusive culture that is the Alta Sierra Wine Shop.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Brew Bakers Coffee and Tea House
description: Offering Temple coffee & teas, Yuba chai, Italian sodas, golden milk, freshly baked sweet & savory items.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: The Owl Tavern
description:
We are two couples with a dream of opening a restaurant in our hometown of Grass Valley, CA. Backed with culinary and agricultural backgrounds, we pride ourselves by providing humanely raised meat and seasonally sourced produce to our wonderful community! 

Join us for a  dining experience like no other at The "Historic” Owl Tavern (originally established in 1852), where culinary excellence meets a cozy, enchanting atmosphere. Savor innovative dishes inspired by local flavors, prepared with the finest seasonal produce.
Enjoy our expertly crafted cocktails, featuring unique blends and house-made infusions. Relax in our warm, inviting space designed to make every meal a memorable occasion. Our friendly staff is dedicated to providing top-notch service and ensuring your visit is nothing short of perfect.

We look forward to providing a level of culinary expertise and service that is worth remembering. Whether it’s a special celebration, a casual meal, or a night out with friends, we promise to make it magical.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Arquils Wine
description: Arquils Wine is a boutique vineyard and winery on the Western Slope of the Sierra in Nevada City, California. Grapes are dry farmed, using age-old sustainable, biodynamic methods attuned to the seasons and to the land, using neither additives nor processing aids. We welcome visitors by appointment.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Avanguardia Winery
description:
A small (actually ultra-boutique) winery, we are    the home of non-traditional blended wines, with the  majority of our wines being proprietary blends  crafted from 2-6 different grape varieties, many of  which are Italian, and all of which are pretty much  out of the mainstream. Check out our page on Our Varieties.

         Avanguardia does not much use the more common varietals, like Cabernet, Zinfandel, or Chardonnay. Our flagship white wine, CRISTALLO, features a grape from the former Soviet Republic of Georgia in Eastern Europe. Our most unique red, AMPIO, combines the UC-patented cross, Carmine, with the French Mondeuse for a taste sensation that is uniquely different. Our newest blend, TRE "T", after the three international varieties used (Teroldego, Tempranillo, and Tannat) is a wine of deep color and great substance, already recognized with Gold at the San Francisco Chronicle competition.

    Our emphasis is always on balance, with just the right amount of alcohol, acidity, tannin or oak, avoiding contemporary trends towards excess in these areas; in some ways our wines are more like Europe than California.

      Dare to be different and try us out---you won't be disappointed! You can visit us at the Winery, five miles due west of Nevada City, or at the Tasting Room at 163 Mill Street (pictured when you view our wine portfolio).

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: BrewHaus
description: We're excited to bring you a place where you can slow down, enjoy the people you're with, and savor a great beer in a relaxed, family-friendly, bike friendly, dog friendly setting.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay

description: Fresh organic produce, vegetarian & health food, wine and sushi.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Communal Cafe
description: Communal Café stands as a beacon of difference and community in downtown Nevada City, CA. With a commitment to excellence and a desire to create a welcoming space, Communal Café embarked on a journey to establish more than just a coffee shop. Here you will find where exceptional coffee meets a mission centered around organic, clean, and locally sourced products. We are committed to providing an extraordinary culinary experience, exploring the realms of baked goods, farm-to-table bowls, toasts, sandwiches, soups, and salads. Our menu is a testament to our dedication to quality, with a focus on nourishing your body and

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill
description: This historic destination is renowned for elevated pub fare, late night dining, libations made with care, a spirited sports atmosphere, world class live music and a feel-good vibe.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Creekside Cottage
description: This family-friendly Nevada City cottage is within a 15-minute walk of Off Broadstreet Theatre, Nevada Theatre, and Historic Firehouse No. 1 Museum.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Dedrick's Cheese
description: Your neighborhood cheese and gourmet foods store. Offering tastes of over 100 cheeses we carry including goat, sheep, cow and occasionally water buffalo milk cheeses. Great cheese and a wonderful experience!

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Elixart Herbal Lounge & Gallery
description: The real “buzz” about Elixart is our alcohol-free, all-ages elixir bar and event space in our legendary flagship location, Nevada City, California

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Friar Tucks Restaurant & Bar
description: Friar Tucks has committed to support local Farmers through The Farmers Markertplace, Gold Country Food Hub. and across the Sacramento Region. Our menu includes non-gmo, non-toxic, without any chemical or synthetic, pesticides, fertilizers or fragrances. Our menu will always be changing as we move through the seasons and we connect with new local farmers and they’re fresh healthy produce. We now offer brunch every weekend from 11 AM to 2 PM.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Garnish
description: Garnish is a community kitchen store and a place to get inspired to cook. We have a beautiful selection of tools, kitchenware, pots, knives, and more for the chef or beginner cook. Our stock of olive oil, spices, chocolate, jams, cheese, and salami is perfect for a gift basket or an evening charcuterie party. Come see what we are cooking!

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Golden Era Lounge
description: Currently open for outdoor cocktails & dining Thursday - Saturday 5-12. Small plates perpared by Chef Antonio on the back patio and side breezeway. Music 7-10.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Harmony Ridge Lodge
description: A mixture of rustic luxury in a stunning natural setting makes Harmony Ridge Lodge the perfect getaway. Our spacious guest suites are exquisitly designed, with many amenities to make you feel at ease. All guest suites have mini refrigerators, microwaves and coffee pots. In the morning we offer continental breakfast in our dining room or outside on the deck. Our tended gardens and 3 1/2 acres of private woods are a great way to take in the beauty of nature.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Heartwood Eatery
description: Local, seasonal, healthy food. Vegan, vegetarian options. Coffee, tea, specialty drinks.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Inn Town Campground
description:
We are located just minutes from downtown Nevada City, California!
Dan and Erin Thiem have brought Nevada City a vibrant camping experience with tents, glamping, and RV sites. The inn town campground is on a historic 15-acre site, just two miles from downtown Nevada City.  We love that we get to be in the heart of gold country camping, so pack your tent, trailer, or glamping gear and join us!

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Java Johns
description: Java John's is a one-of-a-kind Coffeehouse with a menu inspired by family recipes, and simple, honest cooking, catering to all tastes and diets - from "I see it, I eat it", to Vegetarians, Vegans, Keto, and Gluten Free, we have something for everyone. Our family diet is this diverse, so we felt that in order to bring everyone to the table at the same time, we needed to ensure that everyone had something delicious to eat.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Jernigan’s Tap House & Grill
description:
Nevada City Ale House & Family Restaurant
Jernigan’s features fresh, draft beers, delicious handmade food and sports on our big screens.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Lika's Quarter Cafe
description: French/ Californian cuisine, casual and leisurely dining experience. Fresh, delicious food!

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: McGee’s Annex
description: Meet us at McGee's. Your favorite neighborhood bar. Open 7 days a week. Come get your dose of banter, music, and shenanigans.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Nevada City Classic Café
description: Here at the Classic we proudly mix our US and French family heritage, our world traveling and ten years of dining experience to create a classic menu focused on old style, Nevada city meals, mixed with a blend of French country family cuisine. As we have our customers' best interests in mind, especially when it comes to their food, we make sure to select organic and natural foods whenever possible to ensure you receive only the best when it comes to your meal. Try our popular 'Christmas Card Club' as presented in Hallmark's "The Christmas Card".

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Nevada City Winery
description:
Nevada City Winery is located in the scenic Sierra Foothills of California, in the largest historic gold rush town established in the 1850s. We produce a diverse selection of award winning wines right below our tasting room in downtown Nevada City.

Through warm hospitality, and delicious fine wines, we seek to offer all the small-town charm, character, and sense of community one looks for in a local tasting experience.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Northridge
description: Casual Family Dining serving excellent comfort food of burgers, pizza, fish & chips, pasta and salads.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Outer Heaven Espresso
description: Outer Heaven Espresso a place where the littlest big things happen from planning revolutionary change, to writing term papers, or chatting with friends, all while drinking a cup of intentionally roasted coffee, crafted to hold the beauty and power of each bean through to the last sip whether we make it for you in our Nevada City shop, or whether you brew it at home.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Petra
description: Experience the flavors of Mediterranean cuisine at Petra, the newest addition to Nevada City's farm to table dining scene. Our modern concept offers a hot and cold build your own bar and regenerative marketplace where you can indulge in delicious dishes crafted from the freshest sustainably sourced ingredients. Join us for in-house dining, gourmet grab n go, healthy snacks, house made drinks & local beer and wine.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Piety Hill Cottages Motel  B&B
description: Piety Hill Cottages is a quiet retreat just to the south of Nevada City’s historic downtown district. Here you’ll find comfortable accommodations for couples, friends and families. Spread across an acre of park-like grounds, our spacious rooms and ample gardens offer guests plenty of room to breath. A ten minute stroll down Sacramento Street and across the picturesque Pine Street bridge, you’ll find the dining, shopping, nightlife and historical attractions of Downtown Nevada City.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Sopa Thai Cuisine
description:
At SOPA THAI CUISINE we offer meals of excellent quality and invite you to try our delicious food.

The key to our success is simple: providing quality consistent food that taste great every single time. We pride ourselves on serving our customers delicious genuine dishes 

Eat delicious food. Grab a drink. But most of all, relax! We thank you from the bottom of our hearts for your continued support.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Sushi at Nourish
description:
Where Community and Cuisine Come Together

Hello friends, we're Lacie and Ryan Whittington. Born and raised in Nevada County, we're dedicated to the health and well-being of our community. That's why we created Nourish Sushi, nestled in the heart of historic downtown Nevada City, California.

Our restaurant offers Japanese Fusion Sushi & Grill in a family-owned atmosphere. Enjoy our fresh and organic menu, which includes gluten-free, vegetarian, and vegan options. We provide a diverse and flexible dining experience, ensuring the use of sustainable products whenever possible.

We want you to feel at home, enjoy your time with us, and have a wonderful dining experience!

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Szabo Vineyards Tasting Room
description: California wine – with Hungarian roots. Our family blends Rhone-style wine with West Coast terroir and techniques. https://www.szabovineyards.com/

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: The Fern
description: The Fern has become a new staple retro bar and venue of live music and DJ's hosting some of the best live shows and underground music in historic Nevada City.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: The Mine Shaft
description: The Mine Shaft Saloon. Serving Nevada City and our visitors since December 1978.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: The National Exchange Hotel
description: The historic National Exchange Hotel's newly unveiled restoration, combines Victorian opulence with modern comforts. Whether you're planning an intimate celebration, or a grand affair, inside and out, our culinary team has curated menus for every aspect of your big day! For weddings of up to 80 guests. Boosting 38 unique guest rooms, with fifteen luxurious studios and suites and five spacious King Suites to gather your loved ones in preparation of your big day. Engagement parties, Bridal showers, Rehearsal dinners, Send off brunch and welcome receptions, and much more.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: The Outside Inn
description: Providing lodging in Nevada City, California, the Outside Inn is a small hotel that sits in a quiet residential neighborhood just two blocks from downtown.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: The Parsonage 1865
description: The Parsonage 1865 Bed & Breakfast, located at 427 Broad Street in Historic downtown Nevada City, California is one of the most convenient bed and breakfast locations in the area. This B&B is full of history dating back to the mid-1800s. This recently renovated bed & breakfast/inn offers 6 clean comfortable bedrooms, each with its own private bathroom in the main house, and a separate, 1 bedroom 1 bathroom freestanding cottage with kitchenette.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: The Place on South Pine
description: We are serving hearty, healthy breakfast and lunch! Fresh local produce, sauces, and beverages! House-made drinks, weekly specials, and local art!

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: The Stone House
description: Stone House is a historic venue and restaurant in Nevada County creating extraordinary experiences where elevated cuisine meets refined hospitality.  Our 10,000 square foot facility features six unique event spaces including, 2 bars, a dining room, show room, cave, patio and penthouse.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: The Truffle Shop
description: Gourmet chocolate truffles & desserts revered by presidents & popes.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: The Willo Steakhouse
description: Established 1969. Full bar opens at 1:00. Dining room opens at 5:00-A Nevada County Institution. Voted Best Steak 23 years running. Also voted Best Barbeque and Named Favorite Roadhouse Sacramento Magazine. Over 1 million choice Angus New York steaks aged on the premises and cut daily cooked on our grill. Ribeyes available Friday and Saturday. Enjoy a cocktail in our patio garden before dinner.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Three Forks Bakery & Brewing Co.
description: Three Forks Bakery & Brewing Co is a brewery, bakery and restaurant featuring locally-sourced fresh seasonal food. We offer wood-fired pizza, craft beer brewed in our 7 barrel brewhouse, artisan breads and a full line of other sweet and savory baked goods, soup, salad, sandwiches, as well as aguas frescas (fresh seasonal juices), regional wines, hard cider, espresso and loose leaf teas. Real food. Great beer. Made here.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Treats
description: TREATS, of Nevada City, California, serves a unique blend of traditional handmade artisan ice creams with local, seasonal and organic ingredients, seasonal sorbets, and vegan selections. Other Tasty TREATS made from scratch include decadent fresh baked cookies with some gluten free choices.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Restaurant DeKan
description: Restaurant DaKan was founded with a passion for sustainable, community-focused dining. Nestled in the heart of Nevada City, we source our ingredients from local farms and transform them into inspired dishes with global influences. Every plate tells a story, from our partnerships with local farmers to the seasonal rotations of our menu.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: 1856 Speakeasy Suites
description: Stay with us when you visit Nevada City to experience a charming yet enjoyable night's sleep! All rooms have been remodeled in 2023, with brand new beds, bathrooms, and furniture. The design in the remodel has kept the original character of the building built in 1856! Walking distance to all that Nevada City has to offer. 9 rooms that can be rented out all together for a large group coming to visit, or book individually one room at a time!

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Broad Street Inn
description: Broad Street Inn, originally built in 1870, is located in historic downtown Nevada City. Our six room inn offers a peaceful garden setting and is just a short walk to find dining, shopping, wine tasting and theatre. Also available, 700 sq ft carriage house with queen Bed, bath, full kitchen, TV & wifi.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Choquiero Chocolate & Gifts
description: Specialty Chocolate shop featuring Fair Trade exotic chocolate bars from all around the globe, specialty cacao drinks and gifts.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Flume's End
description: Formerly Gold Creek Inn, this exquisite 1860s Victorian has returned to her historic name - Flume’s End. Delightfully perched on the bedrock overlooking Gold Run Creek and beside downtown Nevada City, Flume’s End boasts five elegantly appointed rooms with private baths, balconies, and sublime views of her gardens, waterfalls, and recently restored flume.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Fudenjuce
description: At fudenjüce, we are committed to serving delicious, fresh food that's good for you! Our healthy, all-vegetarian meals include many organic ingredients and vegan options. Our nutritious juices, juice-blends, smoothies and shakes are 100% natural and made fresh to order with no chemicals or additives. We recognize the honor bestowed upon us when you choose us to nourish you!

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Moonrise on Mill St. Inn
description: Folk Victorian in the heart of downtown dating back to 1890. We offer two separate houses for rent; a 1-bedroom and a 3-bedroom house both with outdoor spaces.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Nevada City Chocolate Shoppe
description: Family owned and operated, our delicious handmade chocolates are one of a kind, made in small batches with the greatest of care for your enjoyment! Our handcrafted masterpiece of sweetness, customers near and far rave about our very own Nevada City Gold. You won't find it anywhere else!

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Nevada City Inn
description: Comfortable park like setting, in-town Nevada city. Twenty-seven guest rooms, including seven cottages. AAA approved accommodations, daily complimentary extended continental breakfast.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Northern Queen Inn
description: Our Nevada City CA hotel offers 8 secluded cabins with kitchenettes, 8 spacious chalets with full kitchens, Large two bedroom suits, Standard large suites, studios and standard rooms with one or two queen beds. Our pet-friendly hotel in Nevada City is also a non-smoking property that our guests can truly appreciate. Our hotel is only a few minutes from Downtown Nevada City in the heart of California's Gold Country. Our outdoor wedding venue with a waterfall backdrop can host up to 150 guests.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: SPD Markets
description: Full service supermarket. Voted best supermarket for the past five years. Serving Nevada City since 1959.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: The Ham Stand
description: Upscale Salumeria and catering service specializing in Italian style cured meats, BBQ products and specialty cuts. Small party catering and pick up platters and boxes available.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: The Pizza Joint
description: Family owned Pizzeria offering New York-Style, Detroit-Style, and Grandma Style by the slice to order. Hot, fresh and Fast!

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Two Room Inn
description: Beautiful Victorian Cottage in the heart of historic Nevada City. Located on Broad Street at the edge of the commercial district, this is the perfect location from which to enjoy all that our area has to offer. Walk out your front door and you are in the midst of this most charming, cosmopolitan, perfectly preserved gold rush town with its array of shops, restaurants, cafes and galleries. With the large, very private gardens in the back, the house is perfect for small weddings or other special events for up to 30 people.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: GratiDude Ranch
description:
GratiDude Ranch bridges rustic charm and modern style. It is a timeless place and once you enter, get ready for a magical experience. Originally founded in 2014 in Leipers Fork, TN., GratiDude Ranch recently opened a second location in Northern California in a charming town called Nevada City.

GratiDude Ranch offers a mini-farm, private resort vacation experience. Both locations support agritourism by offering short-term overnight accommodations, private farm dinner chef experiences, murder mystery dinner events and popular learning Birthday Bash gatherings. Private and special events can also be booked. A portion of proceeds from all events help support foster children and foster families through SAFE, a 501c3 non-profit.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Clair Tappaan Lodge
description: Venture out into nature and experience one of the most unique stays in our mountain lodge. We’re nestled amongst the trees where we have Donner Pass as a stunning backdrop to our property. With cozy accommodations and amenities to keep you busy, our lodge is the perfect place to stay for any traveler looking to get out into nature. We have unique event spaces, a convenient location close to Lake Tahoe, and a commitment to sustainability where we uphold the integrity of the natural environment around us. Welcome to Clair Tappaan Lodge, the best lodging near Lake Tahoe, CA.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Willow Springs Lodge & Retreat Center
description: Willow Springs, rich in history from the gold mining days, has transitioned to a place of relaxation and rejuvenation. We now offer a farm setting with a touch of forward thinking. Ideal for intimate gatherings, we invite you to explore our amenities and our upcoming events.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Everline Resort & Spa, Lake Tahoe
description: A full-service, luxury California resort in an idyllic mountain setting, Everline Resort & Spa, Lake Tahoe, rests in Olympic Valley, the third largest ski resort in North America, and just minutes from North Lake Tahoe. This family-friendly hotel and ski resort offers ski-in/ski-out access to the mountain and 405 luxurious rooms and suites that welcome guests with a "mountain meets modern" ambiance. A year-round hub for our outdoor activities in Olympic Valley, the resort boasts a championship golf course, cross-country ski and fly-fishing centers, ice-skating rink, heated swimming pools, water slide and scenic hiking and biking trails.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Palisades Tahoe Lodge
description:
Palisades Tahoe Lodge Rentals condominiums are your convenient and relaxing home base for year-round Tahoe vacation value!

Step into adventure and unwind in style with our upscale, ski-in/ski-out vacation rentals. These units are also conveniently located at the Olympic Valley base of Palisades Tahoe. Our privately owned condominiums blend mountain luxury with laid-back comfort… perfect for a four-season escape.

Whether you’re carving fresh powder in the winter or exploring scenic trails in the summer, you’ll enjoy unbeatable access to world-class outdoor activities, festivals, and Lake Tahoe’s natural beauty. Just minutes from the lake and right on the mountain, our rentals also offer exclusive HOA amenities to elevate every stay.

Make your next vacation unforgettable. Stay where the mountains meet relaxation, and adventure lives right outside your door.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Twelve 28 Kitchen
description:
A warm & comfortable social gathering place where our passion is on food
that we make from the heart and the people we get to enjoy it with!
We source local ingredients when possible as well as craft beers and our wine list , we believe, is one of the best in the foothills!
We look forward to having you as our guest!

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Northridge Penn Valley
description: At Penn Valley Northridge, we believe that great food and great company go hand in hand. Our mission is to create memorable dining experiences by providing exceptional service and delicious cuisine. We are committed to helping our small community in any way possible. Without you we wouldn't succeed so we give back as much as possible.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Tack Room Restaurant and Bar
description: We are a family owned steak house that serves delicious food and beverages to our community. Come in

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Blue Cow Deli
description: Blue Cow Deli offers the area’s finest lunch menu. With a spacious ranch-style dining room and a lovely dog-friendly patio the deli offers a unique and comfortable experience. Blue Cow Deli’s menu includes our signature sandwiches, grilled paninis, mixed green & deli salads, home-style soups, decadent desserts & delicious coffee.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Players Restaurant & Sports Bar
description:
Players Restaurant and Sports Bar is located in Penn Valley, California. We have been a part of the local community for 26 years and counting.

We make our sauces in house with the highest quality and freshest ingredients available. We offer catering as well as our Team & Banquet Room for events and parties.

As sponsors for numerous local sports teams, and members of a tight knit community, we feel an obligation to provide excellent food at an affordable price, a comfortable atmosphere and the best customer service in Nevada County. Players Restaurant and Sports Bar in Penn Valley is the best place to catch a game with the guys or bring the whole family out for a meal.

Come out to Players Restaurant and Sports Bar today to find out why we are “The family place that scores BIG in taste!”

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: The Oaks Clubhouse
description:
The Oaks Clubhouse has a spectacular view of the Lake Wildwood Golf Course. Members and their guests are invited to join us for Breakfast, Lunch, or Dinner at The Oaks Clubhouse!

The Pine Room, with its welcoming atmosphere and fireplace, is the perfect place to relax and enjoy warm, comforting service and an array of cuisines.
The 19th Hole Bar is bustling with activity seven days a week - with three large flat screen TVs, it's a great place to meet friends and enjoy watching a game.
The magnificent Cedar Room is the perfect venue for your special event, offering sweeping views of the Golf Course and pond, a dance floor, stage, and full banquet facility, and delectable banquet menus from Chef Chad.

The Oaks Clubhouse provides the quintessential dining experience and an ideal setting for an event or special occasion. We look forward to seeing you soon at The Oaks!

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Daybreak Cafe
description: Located at 17438 Penn Valley Dr #107, this charming cafe offers a warm embrace of home-style breakfast and brunch options that promise to brighten your morning.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Clarky's BBQ, Smoke & More
description: BBQ Food Trailer serving Smoked Meats and Santa Maria Style BBQ. Voted best BBQ in Best of Nevada County 2023. Open Weds in Grass Valley at Motor Electric or in Penn Valley Fri & Sat, Penn Valley Dr/Spenceville Rd corner. Call for catering 530-701-8911

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Moi's Thai Cafe
description: "Moi's Thai Cafe" in Penn Valley, CA, is a small family-owned gem offering authentic Thai cuisine. With a welcoming staff who are attentive to customer preferences, the focus here is on fresh ingredients and flavorful dishes. From the well-portioned pineapple fried rice to the spicy chicken curry, every bite is a delight. The ambiance is casual yet inviting, perfect for a date night or a family meal. While the spice levels can be intense, the overall experience at Moi's Thai Cafe is one of satisfaction and enjoyment. This spot is a must-visit for those craving delicious Thai food with a personal touch.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Tuscany Gardens Pizzeria
description: You don’t have to go far to get an authentic taste of Italy. We are so excited you are here! Our family has owned and operated our two stores for over 30 years! We can’t wait to cook for you! You can check out our menu, view our locations and dining rooms as well as our banquet rooms! Here you can also read about our family owned and operated restaurants and find ways to contact us if you have any questions!

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Java Dream Coffee Roasters
description: We are a specialty coffee shop. We take pride in serving great coffee with a smile.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: 1882 Bar & Grill at The River Street Inn
description:
The River Street Inn offers small Hotel charm in historic Old Town Truckee. A perfect vacation getaway, just minutes from Lake Tahoe. Built in 1882, this Bed and Breakfast sits on the Truckee River and located in the heart of Old Town. Historic Alpine lodging and river views make the River Street Inn a unique Sierra Mountain Experience.

The River Street Inn’s central Truckee location offers easy access to all the region's activities and ski resorts, including Alpine and Nordic Skiing, ice skating, snowshoeing, snowboarding, skiing, and snowmobiling in the winter. For summer time fun, enjoy a day of golfing, hiking, kayaking, swimming, rafting, or water skiing. Boutique shops and excellent restaurants are just a walk across the street from the River Street Inn. Experience the heart of Old Town Truckee at the River Street Inn. No matter what the season, the River Street Inn is a great starting point for a picturesque Lake Tahoe vacation. Perfect for honeymoons, wedding parties, romantic getaways and family reunions.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Alibi Ale Works
description:
We opened our second location in Truckee California’s historic downtown in June 2017 to offer another venue to enjoy our beers, along with live music and a creative food menu. Alibi Truckee is a comfortable, flexible space for people to gather and relax. We offer 18+ frequently-rotating Alibi beers on draft, as well as cider, wine, and non-alcoholic options. We offer plenty of to-go beer options: cans, bottles, crowlers and growlers. We also have awesome Alibi merchandise for sale, including gift cards. We are a family-friendly establishment and welcome minors.

Dogs are allowed on leash in our outdoor beer garden (weather permitting) but not indoors. We brew small batches of beer here occasionally, often turning the brew day into a homebrewing class. Stay tuned for upcoming dates!

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Bar of America
description: For three decades Bar of America has been a mainstay for Truckee nightlife, with great live music, good food and libations.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
assetType: Artisan Place to Eat, Drink or Stay
name: Best Western Plus Hotel Truckee-Tahoe
description:
Imagine waking up to crisp mountain air, stepping outside to views of the Sierra Nevada, and knowing your day could include hiking, skiing, or strolling through historic downtown Truckee. At Best Western Plus Truckee Tahoe Hotel, the experience begins the moment you arrive. Whether you're here for a summer festival or a winter escape, this hotel offers a seamless blend of comfort, convenience, and local charm that makes every stay memorable.

Located just minutes from Lake Tahoe and top ski resorts like Northstar and Sugar Bowl, the hotel is a gateway to year-round adventure. Guests enjoy a complimentary full hot breakfast featuring burritos and frittatas, perfect fuel before heading out to explore. The heated pool and outdoor hot tub are open year-round, offering relaxation after a day of mountain biking, kayaking, or attending events like Truckee Thursdays or the Barracuda Championship PGA tournament.

Inside, each room is thoughtfully designed with plush bedding, free Wi-Fi, a mini-fridge, and a microwave. The property also features a business center, meeting facilities, and coin-operated laundry for extended stays. Tesla chargers are conveniently located next door, and multilingual staff are available 24/7 to assist with your needs.

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay

sheet: Artisan Places to Eat, Drink or Stay
